cells.rationale: Well-specified single-file streaming-decoder pattern with a fully-named acceptance (chunk-boundary decode, idempotent teardown-discard); correctness-sensitive but the exact approach is handed, so GPT-first at high for the boundary edge cases.

Bounded pure-function floor with an exact 1000-event boundary, two fixtures to rescale, and a docstring/ADR bullet to amend in place — mechanical well-specified work with low blast radius, routing to an everyday GPT tier at medium.

Correctness-critical event-store ingestion I/O where a wrong abstraction (byte-vs-length, short-read handling, fd-identity reconciliation) silently corrupts folded output — a subtle-invariant opus gate, plus a judgment-laden byte-parity fallback decision, at xhigh.

User-facing DISCONNECTED wording (avoiding the glossary Avoid synonym), both-paint-path rendering taste, and delicate slot-ownership/flash-restore idiom matching across several files — judgment-heavy work in a known pattern reusing existing helpers.
